description: Standardize the journal abbreviations for three specific law review articles in your Juris-M library to comply with citation standards (e.g., Bluebook). For 'The Path of the Law' (Holmes), set the journal abbreviation to 'Harv. L. Rev.'; for 'Constitutional Fact Review' (Monaghan), set it to 'Colum. L. Rev.'; and for 'The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts' (Poe), set it to 'Yale L.J.'

targets.title: The Due Process Clause and the Substantive Law of Torts
